response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Highly compatible. The video's lyrics correspond perfectly with the provided JSON references for 'Dancing Reed' and 'Dawn Blue'.
2. JSON Usage: The JSON was used for lyrical accuracy and alignment. The talk segment was manually transcribed and translated.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to synchronize precisely with vocal audio, employing aggressive end-time truncation to avoid cascading delays in rapid speech segments. Empty spaces and pure instrumental sequences have no subtitles.

subtitles.original: 私に構って
教えてよ恋の先を！
拡がって収まんない universe
君の存在は
私の将来までも
subtitles.english: has stepped into even my future,

subtitles.original: 踏み込んだのよ付き合ってよね
一切合切 dance dance dance
subtitles.english: Everything and anything, dance, dance, dance!

subtitles.original: we are dancing reed
夢中になって絡み合ったゼログラビティ
subtitles.english: Becoming obsessed and intertwined, zero gravity.

subtitles.original: 構わず dance dance dance
just a dance just a dance
subtitles.english: Just a dance, just a dance.

subtitles.original: 声は闇に預けたままで
subtitles.english: My voice is left in the darkness.

subtitles.original: 目を覚ましても離れないで
subtitles.english: Even when I wake up, don't leave me.

subtitles.original: Yes! Our second guest is そら先輩！
subtitles.english: Yes! Our second guest is Sora-senpai!

subtitles.original: はい！みんな、こんそめー！ときのそらです！
subtitles.english: Hi! Hello everyone, I'm Tokino Sora!

subtitles.original: カリちゃん、ハッピーバースデー！
Thank you!
そら大先輩、本当にありがとうございます。ずっと一緒に歌いたかったから...
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai, thank you so much! I've always wanted to sing with you...

subtitles.original: あ、本当ですか？ありがとう！
嬉しい。まじで。やった。ヘイ、ヘイ、ヘイ！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy, seriously! Yes! Hey, hey, hey!

subtitles.original: ヘイ、ヘイ、ヘイ！
可愛いよね。すごいたくさん踊りました。
subtitles.english: So cute! We danced a lot!

subtitles.original: あ、踊ったね！
アイドル、わあ。ドキドキ。
subtitles.english: An idol, wow. My heart is pounding.

subtitles.original: ドキドキ？
Yes. お、お、やっぱりXトレンド...
subtitles.english: Yes. Oh, of course, X trends...

subtitles.original: ...X trending number three in Japan!
お、コングラチュレーション！
日本のトレンド。やったー！
やったー！
ありがとう！たくさん使ってね、please ハッシュタグ。
subtitles.english: Thank you! Please use the hashtag a lot!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much! I'm so happy. ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! I'm so happy. Thank you.

subtitles.original: 今回は大好きな曲、一緒に歌いました。「Dancing Reed」！
subtitles.english: This time we sang my favorite song together, "Dancing Reed"!

subtitles.original: Dancing Reed! すごいパーティーハッピーな曲ですよね。大好きです！
subtitles.english: Dancing Reed! It's such a happy party song. I love it!

subtitles.original: ダンスアブル！
ダンスアブル！めっちゃ良かった。
そして、ほら。エメラルド来た！
subtitles.english: And look, the emeralds are here!

subtitles.original: ねー！綺麗！緑！エメラルド！
誕生石ですよね。そう、5月の誕生石、エメラルドです。
subtitles.english: It's the birthstone, right? Yes, May's birthstone is emerald.

subtitles.original: エメラルド。おお、すごい良い発音。ナイスイングリッシュ！
subtitles.english: Emerald. Wow, what great pronunciation. Nice English!

subtitles.original: 本当？ありがとう！
Nice English. Very good. そうですよね。
ちなみに、写真撮ろうか？
subtitles.english: By the way, shall we take a picture?

subtitles.original: あ、撮る！
Let's do it!
いいね。
イェーイ！
写真もアップしてね、X。
subtitles.english: Please post the photos on X too.

subtitles.original: よろしくね！
よろしくね。わあ、楽しい！じゃあ、水飲みましょう。
subtitles.english: We're counting on you. Wow, this is fun! Let's drink some water.

subtitles.original: お、水！乾杯！
乾杯！
飲んだ方がいいっすよね。
そうね。水は大事。
そうだよ。あー、楽しいな。生ライブ。
subtitles.english: Exactly. Ah, this is so fun, a live concert!

subtitles.original: 楽しいね！
もう一曲一緒に歌いたいんですけど、大丈夫ですか？
subtitles.english: I'd love to sing one more song with you, is that okay?

subtitles.original: もちろん！
Let's do it, okay?
Now, everyone, please listen to this next song.
subtitles.english: Now, everyone, please listen to this next song.

subtitles.original: You'll understand why I chose it because Sora-senpai is in the PV for this song.
subtitles.english: You'll understand why I chose it because Sora-senpai is in the PV for this song.

subtitles.original: Please enjoy my original song, "Dawn Blue".
subtitles.english: Please enjoy my original song, "Dawn Blue".

subtitles.original: つかまえて、ほら
この shooting star
A world of our fiction awaits...
subtitles.english: A world of our fiction awaits...

subtitles.original: ずっと同じ毎日に迷いがあっても
subtitles.english: Even if there's hesitation in the same daily routine,

subtitles.original: 気づかないふりをしてたんだ
subtitles.english: I always pretended not to notice.

subtitles.original: ほんのちょっとの勇気がまだ出せなくて
subtitles.english: I couldn't put forth even an ounce of courage,

subtitles.original: まどろむ宇宙で彷徨っていた
subtitles.english: so I dreamily drifted through space.

subtitles.original: 夜空に浮かぶ
星に願いをかけるんだ
I hope...
抱いている夢を絶対諦めたくない
subtitles.english: I never want to give up on the dream I hold dear,

subtitles.original: 走り出すから
追いかけて 今 あの shooting star
subtitles.english: Chase after that shooting star right now!

subtitles.original: 見たことのない ストーリー
subtitles.english: As we move forward to a brand new story,

subtitles.original: 進んでいくんだ
いつの 日にか きっと
描いた セカイ へ
subtitles.english: bring us to the world that we dreamed of,

subtitles.original: 辿り着けるように
subtitles.english: so that we can reach it.

subtitles.original: Let go of the days you thought mattered so
subtitles.english: Let go of the days you thought mattered so,

subtitles.original: Life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
subtitles.english: life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in.

subtitles.original: Is it the world we know, or...
subtitles.english: Is it the world we know, or...
